headline: Carrier Global (CARR) To Report Earnings Tomorrow: Here Is What To Expect
summary: Heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration company Carrier Global (NYSE:CARR) will be announcing earnings results this Thursday before market hours. Here’s what investors should know.

headline: Carrier Increases Its Venture Investment In ZutaCore, A Direct-To-Chip, Waterless Liquid Cooling Solutions Provider, Terms Not Disclosed
summary: The move strengthens a strategic partnership to support high-density AI data centers and advances Carrier's strategy to deliver integrated solutions across the data center thermal lifecycle. It expands its capabilities

headline: Evercore ISI Initiates Coverage of Carrier Global (CARR) with Outperform
summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR) is one of the 7 Best Data Center Cooling Companies to Invest In. On April 13, 2026, Evercore ISI initiated coverage of Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR) with an Outperform rating and a $75 price target. The firm highlighted the company’s portfolio transformation and exposure to secular growth markets such as electrification, […]
